title: Totem Party Popper
description: Change the particle colours (and display settings) of your Totems and the Totem pop
body:
# Totem Party Popper Time to make your Totems pop with a party! Customize the particles and effects of your Totem Popping - Quick Switch Colour Modes - Supports up to 6 different Custom Effect Colours - More Control over the Particles (Size, Speed, Duration, Transparency, Rotations, Gravity & Collision) - Completely Custom Colours (Colour Picker included with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)) - Change Popping Animation Settings (Displayed Item, Size, Length) - Pride Colour Modes - Client Side (Server-side can be syncd with others when installed) All Settings are matching default game settings, you must change them within the Config to see a difference Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) + [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for easy Config editing ![Totem Pop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2ivRTDH7/images/59f2d1541e37935cbb1ccead62443418011bbea0.gif) Totem Pop with Modified Settings + Shaders (See Gallery Config Screen for settings used) ![New Totem Pop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2ivRTDH7/images/56a546745619960c593ad5b3adc2c5243e5824f1.gif) Like Fancy Colours? Why not try out these: - [Explosive Party](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-party) - Custom Explosive Particles - [Rainglow](https://modrinth.com/mod/rainglow) - Coloured Glow Squid, Allays & Slimes. All dyeable & completely client side!

Only supports Fabric 1.19.3+ (Too many issues for version below) *Feel free to use this mod in other modpacks but keep the download within the Modrinth Ecosystem and do not reupload*
